profile.headline: AI Developer & Marketing Analytics Leader
profile.shortBio: I'm Madhu, an AI and analytics engineer with nine years of experience building LLM applications, RAG pipelines, AI agents, and the marketing analytics that prove they drive real outcomes. I work across Python, FastAPI, Next.js, Postgres, vector databases, and GA4. I'm looking for a full-time role on a serious team where I can own AI and analytics end-to-end.
fullBioParagraphs: I build AI. I don't just talk about it. My work splits in two. I help teams put LLMs, RAG, and AI agents into real products without the demo-to-prod cliff. And I clean up the marketing data that's meant to tell them whether any of it actually works.

I write Python and TypeScript every day. I live in FastAPI, Next.js, and SQL. I care about the boring things that keep AI shipping: evals, guardrails, logs, p95s, and who gets paged at 2am. If a project doesn't have a number attached to it, I'll ask for one before we start.
My work has crossed healthcare, travel, media, SaaS, and education. I like systems that are useful after the demo, understandable after handoff, and measurable after launch.

I'm open to a full-time role where I can own AI and analytics end-to-end on a serious product team. Remote is ideal, relocation is possible for the right team, and practical impact matters more than buzzwords.

siteSettings.siteTitle: Madhu Dadi | AI & Analytics Engineer · LLM, RAG, GA4
siteSettings.siteDescription: Madhu Dadi is an AI and analytics engineer with 9+ years building LLM applications, RAG pipelines, AI agents, and marketing analytics that move the numbers.

experiences.description: Lead digital analytics strategy for Novartis Patient Support Services, driving data-informed decisions across patient-engagement platforms.
responsibilities: Led the digital analytics strategy and analytics for Novartis Patient Support Services, ensuring data-driven decision-making across digital platforms to enhance patient engagement and support services.
Developed and implemented key performance indicators (KPIs) and metrics to track the success and impact of digital initiatives, contributing to the optimization of patient support programs.
Collaborated with cross-functional teams (marketing, IT, patient support, and analytics) to drive the integration of digital analytics into business processes and achieve project goals.
Managed end-to-end digital analytics initiatives, from data collection and analysis to actionable insights and reporting, ensuring alignment with organizational objectives.
Trained and mentored team members in digital analytics best practices, fostering a data-centric culture within the Patient Support Services team.
Presented analytical findings and strategic recommendations to senior leadership, facilitating informed decision-making and business growth within the Patient Support Services division.
Utilized advanced analytics tools (e.g., Google Analytics, Power BI, Advanced Modelling, etc.) to measure and improve digital engagement, patient satisfaction, and operational efficiency.
achievements: Best Performer of the Quarter, Q1 2024

experiences.description: Led measurement for ATL, BTL, and digital campaigns across India, Malaysia, Indonesia, and Singapore. Built brand playbooks and CLM strategy.
responsibilities: Handled the planning, execution and optimization of brand campaigns on Facebook, Programmatic and Google ads.
Performed impact analysis and reporting of the brand campaigns across all redBus markets (India, Malaysia, Indonesia and Singapore) and helped in increasing the Brand awareness by 15%.
Handled the Planning and Strategy for the CLM campaigns (Email, WhatsApp, SMS, PNs) and reducing the churn rate by 20%.
Led the Marketing Analytics team in redBus to provide measurement solutions for ATL, BTL and Digital Campaigns.
Created Brand Playbooks for Digital, Social and Owned media to effectively optimise the campaign budgets and increase the ROI of Brand initiatives.

experiences.description: Led Google Ads Data Hub projects for top-5% GroupM clients: frequency reach, brand lift studies, and first-party data activation.
responsibilities: Led the Google Ads Data Hub projects across GroupM agencies and worked for the top 5% of the clients of GroupM.
Performed frequency reach analysis to find the optimal number of exposures of ads in a cost-effective way.
Performed brand lift study, identified the most optimal consumer journey from first touch point to last touch point and measured the performance in terms of conversion lift.
Brought awareness of 1st party data solutions to increase the targeting by using cluster analysis, cost benefit analysis and pricing analytics to the clients.
achievements: Performer of the Year 2020-21 - WPP NextGen

experiences.description: Web analytics, SEO, SMM, and SEM with descriptive and predictive modelling. Reduced bounce 25%, lifted CTR 20%.
responsibilities: Performed analysis on websites using Google Analytics to improve traffic and worked on SEO, SMM and SEM Campaigns using Descriptive and Predictive modellings and decreased the bounce rate by 25%.
Strategized, planned and executed social media campaigns across all platforms including Instagram and Facebook.
Implemented, Analyzed and Optimized organic and paid search engine marketing activities and increase the CTR by 20%.
Formulated and documented the project/product plan for web applications.

projects.title: Adticks
projects.impactSummary: Crawls 10,000+ pages in parallel with Playwright. Compares server HTML to the rendered DOM. Returns a ranked fix list for SEO, AEO, and GEO. Audits that took a week now take an afternoon.
projects.coverImageAlt: Adticks search and AI visibility measurement platform, designed and built by Madhu Dadi.
projects.problemStatement: As search shifts from ten blue links to AI Overviews and answer engines (ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, Perplexity), brands struggle to measure and maintain visibility across LLM systems. Standard crawlers don't diagnose accessibility issues specific to generative crawlers (GPTBot, ClaudeBot, PerplexityBot), and client-side JS rendering hides critical semantic content, entity relationships, and schema.org markup from LLM crawlers, leading to omission from AI citations.
projects.solutionApproach:
Designed Adticks as a unified inside-out site auditing engine.
Runs parallel headless crawls with Playwright to identify render-parity gaps between raw server HTML and fully client-rendered DOM.
Audits robots.txt, sitemaps, structured data schemas, and llms.txt configurations.
FastAPI + Celery backend schedules deep crawls, parses with selectolax, and runs 18 parallel audit analyzers.
Outputs severity-prioritized fix queues tailored for SEO, AEO, and GEO.

impactMetrics.label: pages per audit with parallel headless rendering
reduction in technical audit cycle time
indexing and AI Overview citation readiness through render-parity diagnostics

projects.title: Technical Blog
projects.tagline: RAG-Powered Learning Platform with AI Assistant
projects.impactSummary: A series-based tech blog with an assistant that has actually read the blog. Vector-grounded answers with citations. Instant in-page search. Ranks for humans and LLMs alike.
projects.coverImageAlt: Technical Blog case study preview showing a RAG-powered learning platform and AI assistant by Madhu Dadi.
projects.problemStatement: Software developers, AI engineers, and data analysts face fragmented, surface-level learning resources. Most guides cover hello-world LLM concepts but skip the edge cases, structural design decisions, and real-world deployment challenges of pipelines like RAG. Static docs lack interactive search, forcing engineers to dig through forums and repos for verified patterns.
projects.solutionApproach:
Built series-based learning paths that teach technical concepts progressively.
Integrated a custom production-grade AI Assistant powered by a localized RAG pipeline.
Used Next.js for server-rendered page speed and Tailwind CSS for the visual system.
Connected a secure FastAPI backend with custom execution runtime test runners.

impactMetrics.label: ranking on high-intent AI and engineering topics
lower user search latency through grounded RAG answers
TTFB for bots and humans through CI and cache warming

projects.title: Udemy Enroller using FastAPI
projects.impactSummary: Scrapes Udemy coupon sources, validates each link, and enrolls users automatically through an async FastAPI and Celery queue. Has delivered 20,000+ free courses in six months. Roughly Rs 10L in saved tuition.
projects.coverImageAlt: Udemy Enroller using FastAPI case study preview showing async course enrollment automation.
projects.problemStatement: Finding free or discounted Udemy courses is repetitive and time-sensitive. Users had to monitor multiple coupon sites, copy links, and enroll before short validity windows expired, losing opportunities to timezone gaps and manual toil. The system needed a robust, high-availability architecture to handle async queues and rate-limiting gracefully.
projects.solutionApproach:
FastAPI service for the core API layer with session-based Udemy authentication.
Celery + Redis for async task processing and concurrent enrollments.
Scraping and validation pipeline that authenticates, verifies coupons, and enrolls users without manual input.
Comprehensive logging and monitoring to track success rates and handle CAPTCHAs or IP blocks.

impactMetrics.label: free courses delivered in six months
